items.title: For one afternoon, Siakam and Nembhard got to experience one of Indy's most cherished traditions from the center of it all.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
For one afternoon, Siakam and Nembhard got to experience one of Indy's most cherished traditions from the center of it all.

Next May, however, they hope to be watching from afar — still busy chasing a championship with the Pacers.

www.fieldhousefiles.com/p/pacers-sia...
